Description: Jaskirat Singh Rangi erases his identity and leaves his family to live as a 'ghost' in Pakistan. He operates as a spy, knowing he will die at the hands of terrorists with no one to claim his body.
The protagonist continues his deep-cover mission, accepting a nameless, lonely death to ensure the safety of India, proving that the greatest sacrifice is one that the world never sees.
A group of Indian intelligence officers use high-tech equipment and old-school grit to track down a nuclear bomb hidden in New Delhi by terrorists seeking to avenge the 1971 war defeat.
A slow-burn, gritty biopic of Udham Singh, who traveled across continents and lived in the shadows for years to assassinate the man responsible for the Jallianwala Bagh massacre.
Based on true events, a wealthy businessman in Kuwait risks his life, his family, and his fortune to lead the massive evacuation of over 170,000 stranded Indians during the Gulf War.
A NASA scientist returns to his native village in India and decides to leave his prestigious global career behind to bring electricity and progress to the grassroots level.
A common man takes a silent but dangerous stand against the system, orchestrating a complex plan to eliminate terrorists himself for the nation's safety.
A medical student sacrifices his career and personal safety to join the IPS and dismantle a cross-border illegal arms smuggling network that threatens national security.
A high-stakes political and intelligence thriller exploring the covert operations and strategic maneuvers that led to the historic decision of revoking Article 370 in Kashmir.
The true story of a team of Indian officers who worked in total secrecy to conduct nuclear tests while evading American satellite surveillance to make India a nuclear power.
An Indian intelligence officer is caught in a web of international conspiracy and civil war while trying to prevent the assassination of a former Prime Minister.
The definitive biography of Bhagat Singh, the young revolutionary who gave up his life and famously chose the gallows to spark a fire in the hearts of Indians for freedom.
A detailed account of the Indian Army's strategic retaliatory strike against terrorist launchpads following the Uri attack, showcasing precision and military bravery.
The heroic biopic of Captain Vikram Batra, who sacrificed his life reclaiming Indian territory during the 1999 Kargil War, posthumously receiving the Param Vir Chakra.
A classic depiction of the Battle of Longewala during the 1971 Indo-Pak war, where a small unit of soldiers held their ground against an entire tank regiment.
The life story of Sam Manekshaw, India's first Field Marshal, highlighting his military genius and leadership during the 1971 war.
A harrowing and raw story of six Indian Prisoners of War who attempt a daring escape from a Pakistani camp to return to their motherland.
Based on the life of Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, who sacrificed his life while saving hostages during the 26/11 Mumbai terror attacks.
A tribute to the Indian Navy personnel aboard the INS Rajput who fought a secret underwater battle to sink the Pakistani submarine PNS Ghazi during the 1971 war.
An aimless young man finds his purpose and becomes a dedicated army officer, leading a dangerous mission to capture a peak during the Kargil conflict.
